LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONERS THE BOARD OF TRUSTEES, IN THEIR CAPACITY AS TRUSTEES OF THE CARPENTERS HEALTH AND WELFARE TRUST FOR CALIFORNIA, CARPENTERS VACATION-HOLIDAY TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA, CARPENTERS PENSION TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA, CARPENTERS ANNUITY TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA, CARPENTERS TRAINING TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA, NORTHERN CALIFORNIA CARPENTERS REGIONAL COUNCIL'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. THE COURT ALSO AWARDS REASONABLE ATTORNEY FEES IN THE AMOUNT OF $962.50 (WHICH INCLUDES ONE ADDITIONAL HOUR OF LEGAL WORK IN CONNECTION WITH ENTRY AND SERVICE OF THIS ORDER) AND COSTS IN THE AMOUNT OF $540.00. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN, CSR #6185 (302)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arb Award
Off Calendar Oct-16-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: DANIEL BROME, ESQ., 510.337.1001, FOR PETITIONER THE BOARD OF TRUSTEES; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONERS THE BOARD OF TRUSTEES, IN THEIR CAPACITY AS TRUSTEES OF THE CARPENTERS HEALTH AND WELFARE TRUST FOR CALIFORNIA, CARPENTERS VACATION-HOLIDAY TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA, CARPENTERS PENSION TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA, CARPENTERS ANNUITY TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA, CARPENTERS TRAINING TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA, NORTHERN CALIFORNIA CARPENTERS REGIONAL COUNCIL's Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is granted. No opposition filed. The Court also awards reasonable attorney fees in the amount of $962.50 (which includes one additional hour of legal work in connection with entry and service of this order) and costs in the amount of $540.00. Order signed in open court. Judgment signed in open court. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR #6185
